name: Dungless
short_description: Dungless is a 2D platformer with a procedurally generated world that will create a unique adventure for you every time that never happens again. Fight monsters, collect gold, go deeper and deeper into the dungeons.
detailed_description:
The young adventurer goes into a dungeon full of dangers to prove to everyone that he can fight monsters and collect a bunch of jewels!

Dungless is a 2D platformer with a procedurally generated world that will create a unique adventure for you every time that never happens again. Fight monsters, collect gold, go deeper and deeper into the dungeons.

Features of the game:
- Procedural level generation
- Endless dungeons
- Pixel Art
